{{Quote|Don't spill your water, and don't kill Chewie.|Sue Rostoni, on what she's learned during her work in the ''Star Wars'' universe|<ref name="Panel">{{WebCite|url=http://www.eucantina.net/archives/4227|text=Fate of the Jedi Panel Video (UPDATED)|date=2009-07-31|author=Austin|nolive=1|archivedate=20160407154151}}</ref>}}
'''Sue Rostoni''' was the executive editor and fiction and comic editor at [[Lucas Licensing]].

==Biography==
In [[1992]] Rostoni started maintaining a timeline of ''Star Wars'', with important events and lifespans of characters.<ref name="secrets" />

She had access to [[Lucasfilm]] extensive photo archive, and provided [[Joe Hutsko]] with concept art and storyboard sketches of the [[Original trilogy]] for the publication of ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault: The Official Insider's Guide]]''.<ref name="RA Insider">''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault: The Official Insider's Guide]]''</ref>

Rostoni had some participation in the ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' multimedia project; she compiled a package with pictures and rough size descriptions for the ships that would be featured in the project, in order to be followed by subsidiary creators.<ref>''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'', Part 4: Battle Zones, II. Battleships</ref>

In her role at Lucas Licensing, Rostoni was responsible for the maintenance of the printed [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]]. She worked with [[Shelly Shapiro]] of [[Del Rey]] and [[James Luceno]] in [[1998]] to plan the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|New Jedi Order]] series.

The [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] character [[Eeusu Estornii/Legends|Eeusu Estornii]], portrayed by [[Jacqui Louez]], was named after Rostoni. However, the character was cut from final release of the film. [[Esu Rotsino/Legends|Esu Rotsino]] and the [[R0/5T.N1 tree feeder]] were also named for her.

Rostoni had a blog on [[StarWars.com]] under the screenname '''Eeusu Estornii'''. On [[June 9]], [[2011]], StarWars.com announced that Rostoni planned to retire as ''[[Star Wars]]'' editor in [[July]].<ref>{{SWArchive|url=vault/books/rostoni_retirement/index.html|text=Sue Rostoni to Retire as ''Star Wars'' Editor}}</ref>
